name: NavFilter
description: A pill-shaped filter tab used in global navigation to switch between content categories. Fixed 40px height, auto width (hugs label). Always rendered inside a NavFilterGroup (role=tablist). Three distinct visual states: light-gray pill (default), solid-black pill with white text (active), dark-gray pill with white text (hover).

layout.borderRadiusNote: Full pill — hardcoded in source, no token bound. Requires a full-pill radius token in S2A (e.g. --s2a-border-radius-full).

props.name: label
props.description: Visible label text for the filter tab.

props.name: active
props.description: Marks this tab as the currently selected filter. Sets aria-selected and applies the active visual style (solid black pill, white text).

props.name: disabled
props.description: Prevents interaction. Use when a filter category has no results.

props.name: onClick
props.description: Called when the filter tab is activated.

props.name: state
props.description: Forces a visual state. For testing and documentation only — use active prop for programmatic selection.

tokenFlags.⚠ background-color:default: s2a/color/transparent/black/04 is not in the S2A semantic token index. Primitive transparent token — needs a semantic alias (e.g. --s2a-color-surface-overlay-subtle) before shipping.
tokenFlags.⚠ background-color:active: s2a/color/IconButton/background/primary/solid/default is an IconButton component token being borrowed. NavFilter should have its own --s2a-color-nav-filter-background-active token.
tokenFlags.⚠ background-color:hover: s2a/color/transparent/black/48 is not in the S2A semantic token index. Primitive transparent token — needs a semantic alias (e.g. --s2a-color-surface-overlay-strong).
tokenFlags.⚠ Figma property name: Source component uses 'Property 1' instead of 'State'. Rename in Figma's Properties panel before publishing.

keyboard.action: Moves focus to the next filter tab
Moves focus to the previous filter tab

notes: Must be rendered inside a container with role=tablist (e.g. NavFilterGroup).
Active state is communicated via aria-selected=true. Do not use aria-pressed.
Disabled tabs should remain focusable (do not set tabindex=-1) so keyboard users can discover them.
